title: Inventory Buttons
description: Brings the "Inventory Buttons" feature from NotEnoughUpdates (NEU) to 1.21.11 / 1.21.5
body:
# Inventory Buttons (Unofficial Port)

A Fabric mod that brings the popular "Inventory Buttons" feature from [NotEnoughUpdates (NEU)](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughupdates) to the 1.21.11 and 1.21.5 versions of Minecraft.

## Features

* **Quick Inventory Access:** Add customizable buttons to your inventory and chest GUIs for quick actions. 
* **Editor Mode:** Easily move and configure buttons to suit your playstyle.
* **Fabric Port:** Native support for Minecraft 1.21.11 or 1.21.5 using the Fabric Mod Loader.

## Mod Commands
Use `/invbuttons` or `/inventorybuttons` to open the mod's main config. At the moment, there are just a few qol settings.

Access the button editor through the config or use the command `/inventorybuttons edit` (or `/invbuttons edit`)

## Bugs and Issues
Please report bugs and issues to the mod's GitHub issues page [here](https://github.com/afranz29/Inventory-Buttons/issues) (also accessible on the right hand side of the Modrinth page)

## Credits & Attribution

This mod is a derivative work based on **NotEnoughUpdates (NEU)**.

* **Original Author:** [Moulberry](https://github.com/Moulberry), Many other contributors
* **Original Repository:** [NotEnoughUpdate](https://github.com/NotEnoughUpdates/NotEnoughUpdates)
* **Assets & Design:** All textures and design concepts for the buttons and editor are the intellectual property of the NotEnoughUpdates contributors.

This port is not endorsed by, affiliated with, or supported by the official NotEnoughUpdates team. Please do not report bugs regarding this mod to the official NEU tracker.
